ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_number" TEXT /* Number the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Player's jersey number */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's current salary */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current assistant coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the season ended */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs) */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances in the season */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won in the season */,
  "regular_season_wins" INTEGER /* Number of regular season wins */,
  "regular_season_losses" INTEGER /* Number of regular season losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who took the shot */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* Reference to the season the shot was taken in */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the shot was taken in */,
  "loc_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the shot location on the court */,
  "loc_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the shot location on the court */,
  "shot_made" INTEGER /* 1 if the shot was made, 0 if missed */,
  "shot_attempt" INTEGER /* Number of attempts from the same location in the game */,
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of shot */,
  "shot_distance" REAL /* Distance from the basket in feet */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the game when the shot was taken */,
  "shot_zone" TEXT /* Zone on the court where the shot was taken (e.g., paint, mid-range, three-point) */,
  "shot_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the shot (e.g., "Corner three-pointer") */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_shot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_type_id") REFERENCES shot_types ("shot_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* Reference to the season the game is part of */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., "Final", "Overtime") */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the arena's capacity that was filled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_types" (
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot type */,
  "shot_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shot type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shot type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the shot outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shot outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shot the attempt is part of */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Number of the attempt in the sequence of attempts from the same location */,
  "time_since_previous_attempt" REAL /* Time in seconds since the previous attempt from the same location */,
  "distance_from_basket" REAL /* Distance from the basket in feet */,
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of shot */,
  "shot_distance" REAL /* Distance from the basket in feet */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the game when the shot was taken */,
  "shot_zone" TEXT /* Zone on the court where the shot was taken (e.g., paint, mid-range, three-point) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shot_attempts_shot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_type_id") REFERENCES shot_types ("shot_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shot_attempts_shot_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_id") REFERENCES shots ("shot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
